scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres 2>/dev/null || docker-compose up -d postgres
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run seed && cd ../admin-web && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run setup && concurrently -k -n api,admin -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin"
